barauni.title: Barauni Refinery Expansion Project Progresses Smoothly
barauni.description: IOCL's Barauni Refinery expansion project reaches new milestones, enhancing local crude processing capacity.

barauni.title: Environment Initiative at Indian Oil Barauni Refinery
barauni.description: Barauni Refinery conducts extensive tree plantation drive and eco-restoration initiative in surrounding areas.

barauni.title: Safety Workshop Deployed at IOCL Barauni Refinery
barauni.description: Barauni refinery hosts a safety workshop for operational employees to enforce strict zero-accident protocols.

official.title: IndianOil Annual Performance Review Highlights Growth
official.description: Indian Oil Corporation releases its annual official update on production, refinement output, and operations.

official.title: IOCL Expands Retail Fuel Network Across Key Regions
official.description: Official announcement from IndianOil regarding new retail outlet openings to support growing energy demand.

official.title: IndianOil Corporate Social Responsibility Initiatives Launched
official.description: IndianOil announces a series of healthcare and education support projects in rural areas surrounding key hubs.

financial.title: IndianOil Reports Strong Q1 Profit Performance
financial.description: IOCL announces financial results for the first quarter, highlighting solid operational revenue and market stability.

financial.title: IOCL Board Recommends Final Dividend for FY 2025-26
financial.description: Indian Oil Corporation Limited shareholders to receive dividend payouts as recommended by the executive board.

financial.title: IndianOil Shares Witness Stable Growth on Stock Exchanges
financial.description: Market analysts highlight positive long-term outlook for IndianOil shares based on robust energy demand.

recruitment.title: IOCL Recruitment Drive Opens for Engineering Executives
recruitment.description: Indian Oil Careers portal invites online applications for graduate engineering apprentices across various disciplines.

recruitment.title: Indian Oil Careers: Non-Executive Vacancies Announced
recruitment.description: IOCL announces recruitment for technical non-executive profiles across multiple refinery units.

recruitment.title: IOCL Appoints New Apprentices for Skill Training Programs
recruitment.description: IndianOil completes registration for new apprentices under the national skill development initiative.

digital.title: IndianOil Digital Expansion Drives Smarter Refinery Operations
digital.description: IOCL deploys new enterprise AI and automation solutions for real-time monitoring and safety tracking.

digital.title: IOCL Implements Automation Software in Distribution Hubs
digital.description: IndianOil adopts digital logistics tools to optimize supply chain pipelines and fuel delivery speed.

digital.title: IndianOil Cyber Security Upgrades for Tech Infrastructure
digital.description: IOCL rolls out enhanced digital security controls to protect refinery IT and operational database networks.
